created_for_task: Task checkbox-6: Add PDF extraction fixture definitions for public PP&D applications and checklists.

notes: Synthetic text snippets are representative extraction inputs, not copied public documents.
Future live extraction tests should replace synthetic text only after approved public PDF capture with URL, timestamp, content hash, and robots/crawl-policy evidence.

synthetic_pdf_text_pages.text:
Building Permit Application
Project address
Property owner name
Applicant name
Contractor business name
CCB license number
Project description
Valuation
Type of work
Required attachments
Applicant signature
Date

Submittal instructions
Plans and supporting documents must be provided as searchable PDF files when required. Separate calculations, reports, and application forms from drawing plan sets when instructed by PP&D guidance.

expected_extraction.title: Building Permit Application
evidence_expectations: Every extracted required field preserves page_number provenance.
Signature labels are classified separately from general text labels.
PDF file-rule language is retained as instructions, not converted into a legal obligation without later source review.

synthetic_pdf_text_pages.text:
Residential Permit Submittal Checklist
Project information
Site plan
Floor plans
Elevations
Structural details
Energy forms
Engineering calculations if required
Completed permit application
Owner or contractor information

Checklist
[ ] Site plan included
[ ] Floor plans included
[ ] Elevations included
[ ] Structural details included
[ ] Energy documentation included
Additional information may be requested during plan review.

expected_extraction.title: Residential Permit Submittal Checklist
evidence_expectations: Checked and unchecked boxes are represented distinctly when a captured PDF exposes box state.
Conditional phrases such as if required are retained on the extracted item.

synthetic_pdf_text_pages.text:
Commercial Building Permit Submittal Checklist
Permit application
Construction drawings
Code summary
Life safety plan
Structural calculations
Accessibility information
Site plan
Energy code compliance documentation

Plan review submittal
Provide drawings as searchable PDF files. Provide calculations and supporting documents as separate PDF files when instructed. Incomplete submittals may require correction before review can proceed.

expected_extraction.title: Commercial Building Permit Submittal Checklist
evidence_expectations: File-format rules are extracted with page provenance.
Document requirements are normalized separately from workflow status text.
Incomplete-submittal language is flagged for later requirement review rather than treated as an executable action gate by this fixture alone.
